description: When a persona is created without a corresponding behavioral test, the gap tends to persist until explicitly remediated. Specification-validation gaps do not self-heal — they accumulate silently. In our case, 8 personas existed without tests and the gap was only closed through a deliberate PDCA cycle, not organic development.
source_patterns: pdca:2026-03-17-behavioral-test-gap — 8 personas existed without tests until explicit remediation
belief:2026-03-17-behavioral-test-coverage — all 14 personas now have tests only after automated remediation
evolution:2026-03-17-default-constitution — constitution is the most-cited artifact (11 citations) yet its persona tests were among the missing
rule:persona-requirements — rule requiring tests existed before the tests themselves did
